evidence: "Excellent and timely drama concerning our current technology addictions and advancements."
"It does move a little too quickly for such a complex story but still a superb film."
"Some story lines are slow and far fetched."
"Many quick plot twists, and never a dull moment."
"This series has been exceptional from start to present and season six continues that excellence."
"The story, script, and casting are excellent except Elvis!"
"Simon Baker is so captivating and young in this period piece."
"I love this series and have never missed an episode."
"Beautiful cast, fabulous scenery, great drama, and brilliantly crafted flashbacks."
"This is a wonderful show, brilliantly done!"
"This series has been exceptional from start to present and season six continues that excellence."
"I loved this series and am sad to see it end."

summary: The user has a strong preference for engaging comedies and dramas, often appreciating fast pacing and high production quality. They show loyalty to creators like Darren Star and value immersive storytelling with emotional depth.
